---
title: "RNA-Seq Data Analysis using DESeq2"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*.



```{r}
# =============================================================================
# DESeq2 Differential Expression Analysis
# =============================================================================
 
# --- Install missing packages ------------------------------------------------
 
cran_pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "readxl", "pheatmap", "ggplot2",
               "ggrepel", "writexl")
bioc_pkgs <- c("DESeq2", "org.Hs.eg.db", "AnnotationDbi")
 
for (pkg in cran_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages(pkg)
}
 
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")
 
for (pkg in bioc_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install(pkg)
}
 
# --- Import packages ------------------------------------------------
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(DESeq2)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(writexl)
 
# --- Config (edit this block per experiment) ----------------------------------
pathToMeta  <- "D:/random/RNASeq/metaData.xlsx"
countsDir   <- "D:/random/RNASeq/readCounts/"
outDir      <- "D:/random/RNASeq/"
 
filePattern <- "_L001_featurecounts\\.txt$"   # regex matching count files
refLevel    <- "NT"                     # reference level for contrast
testLevel   <- "ZNF335_KO"
alpha       <- 0.05                            # padj threshold
lfcThresh   <- 1                               # log2FC threshold for up/down
labelLFC    <- log2(5)                        # min |log2FC| for volcano labels
labelPadj   <- 0.005                           # max padj for volcano labels
labelPadjAlt <- 1e-200                         # label anything below this padj
 
# Samples to drop (set to NULL if none)
dropSamples <- c("1_WT_NT_Hela_277_300_S21")  # e.g. outlier from NT control
 
# =============================================================================
# 1. Load & merge featureCounts files
# =============================================================================
 
files <- list.files(path = countsDir,
                    pattern = filePattern,
                    full.names = TRUE)
 
counts_df <- files %>%
  map(function(f) {
    df <- read.table(f, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, skip = 1, comment.char = "#")
    sample_name <- basename(f) %>% gsub(filePattern, "", .)
    colnames(df)[ncol(df)] <- sample_name
    df[, c("Geneid", sample_name)]
  }) %>%
  purrr::reduce(full_join, by = "Geneid")
 
rownames(counts_df) <- counts_df$Geneid
counts_df$Geneid    <- NULL
 
head(counts_df)
 
# =============================================================================
# 2. Load metadata
# =============================================================================
 
metaData <- as.data.frame(read_xlsx(pathToMeta))
rownames(metaData) <- metaData$id
metaData$id        <- NULL
 
# =============================================================================
# 3. Remove outlier samples (if any)
# =============================================================================
 
if (!is.null(dropSamples)) {
  keep <- !(colnames(counts_df) %in% dropSamples)
  counts_df <- counts_df[, keep]
  metaData  <- metaData[colnames(counts_df), , drop = FALSE]
}
 
# =============================================================================
# 4. Verify column/row order alignment before building DESeq object
# =============================================================================
 
stopifnot(all(rownames(metaData) == colnames(counts_df)))
 
# If the above fails, reorder:
# counts_df <- counts_df[, rownames(metaData)]
 
# =============================================================================
# 5. Build DESeqDataSet & normalize
# =============================================================================
 
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_df,
                              colData   = metaData,
                              design    = ~ condition)
 
dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds)

#Keep only genes with >= 10 counts
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10; dds <- dds[keep, ]

norm_counts            <- as.data.frame(counts(dds, normalized = TRUE))
norm_counts$ensembl_id <- rownames(norm_counts)
 
# =============================================================================
# 6. QC: PCA & sample-correlation heatmap
# =============================================================================
 
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
 
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition")
 
vsd_cor       <- cor(assay(vsd))
annotation_df <- data.frame(condition = metaData$condition,
                             row.names = rownames(metaData))
 
pheatmap(vsd_cor, annotation_col = annotation_df)
 
# =============================================================================
# 7. Run DESeq2
# =============================================================================
 
dds$condition <- relevel(dds$condition, ref = refLevel)
dds           <- DESeq(dds)
 
resultsNames(dds)
plotDispEsts(dds)
 
# =============================================================================
# 8. Extract & shrink results
# =============================================================================
 
coef_name <- paste0("condition_", testLevel, "_vs_", refLevel)  # first non-intercept coefficient
message("Using coefficient: ", coef_name)
 
results_raw <- results(dds, name = coef_name, alpha = alpha)
 
results_shr <- lfcShrink(dds,
                          coef = coef_name,
                          res  = results_raw,
                          type = "apeglm")
summary(results_shr)
 
# =============================================================================
# 9. Annotate results
# =============================================================================
 
results_df <- as.data.frame(results_shr)
results_df <- results_df[!is.na(results_df$padj), ]
results_df$ensembl_id <- rownames(results_df)
 
results_df$gene_name <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                                keys      = results_df$ensembl_id,
                                column    = "SYMBOL",
                                keytype   = "ENSEMBL",
                                multiVals = "first")
 
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      padj < alpha & log2FoldChange >  lfcThresh ~ "up",
      padj < alpha & log2FoldChange < -lfcThresh ~ "down",
      TRUE                                        ~ "ns"
    ),
    label = ifelse(
      (abs(log2FoldChange) >= labelLFC & padj < labelPadj) | padj < labelPadjAlt,
      gene_name,
      NA_character_
    )
  )

results_df$padj <- pmax(results_df$padj, 1e-300)
# =============================================================================
# 10. Volcano plot
# =============================================================================
 
sig_colors <- c("up" = "#185FA5", "down" = "#993C1D", "ns" = "grey70")
 
vp <- ggplot(results_df,
             aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = direction)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(alpha), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfcThresh, lfcThresh), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = label),
    size          = 2.8,
    max.overlaps  = 100,
    box.padding   = 0.4,
    segment.color = "grey60",
    segment.size  = 0.3,
    na.rm         = TRUE,
    show.legend   = FALSE,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = sig_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x     = expression(log[2]~"Fold Change"),
    y     = expression(-log[10]~"Adj. p-value"),
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major    = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor    = element_blank(),
    panel.border        = element_rect(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.title          = element_text(size = 13, color = "grey30"),
    axis.text           = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40"),
    legend.position     = "top",
    legend.justification = "left",
    legend.text         = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin         = margin(10, 15, 10, 10)
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1)))
 
print(vp)
 
# Spot-checks
results_df[!is.na(results_df$label), c("gene_name", "log2FoldChange", "padj")]
 
# =============================================================================
# 11. Export
# =============================================================================
 
# Derive contrast name from coefficient for output filenames
contrastTag <- gsub("^condition_", "", coef_name)
 
results_export <- results_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_name)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-label) %>%
  merge(norm_counts, by = "ensembl_id")
 
write_xlsx(results_export,
           file.path(outDir, paste0("final_", contrastTag, ".xlsx")))
 
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outDir, paste0("volcano_plot_", contrastTag, ".pdf")),
  plot     = vp,
  device   = cairo_pdf,
  width    = 7,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in"
)
```
